message:
test(ftui-layout): add 20 proptest invariants for constraint solver and rounding

Property-based tests covering:
- Sum conservation (sizes never exceed available space)
- Solver determinism
- Rect count matches constraint count
- Horizontal/vertical rects fit within parent area
- Max constraint clamping
- Fixed constraint exact allocation
- Empty area and no-constraint edge cases
- Breakpoint classification monotonicity and reachability
- round_layout_stable sum conservation, bounded displacement, determinism, temporal coherence
- Direction symmetry (horizontal vs vertical)
- Gap and margin handling
- No panics on extreme values (u16::MAX, zero dimensions)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
